expectations.text: Explicitly launches or describes launching code-simplifier subagent(s) for the changed files
expectations.evidence: The `Subagent Dispatch` section explicitly includes `code-simplifier-1` with the changed files in scope.

expectations.text: Launches 3 code-reviewer subagents with distinct review lenses (simplicity/DRY, bugs/correctness, conventions/abstractions)
expectations.evidence: The response launches `code-reviewer-1`, `code-reviewer-2`, and `code-reviewer-3` with the lenses `Simplicity & DRY`, `Bugs & correctness`, and `Conventions & abstractions`.

expectations.text: Uses a single materialized review_scope_files list shared across all subagents
expectations.evidence: Each subagent scope is described as the same four files listed under `review_scope_files`.

expectations.text: Shows a Review Scope Coverage block with file counts and Completion Gate
expectations.evidence: A `Review Scope Coverage` block is present with counts and a `Completion Gate` line.

claims.claim: All review subagents share the same four-file review scope.
claims.evidence: Each scope repeats the four files listed in `review_scope_files`.
The coverage block reports `Missing Files: 0` and current status `COMPLETE`.
